details.productUrlName: The Crown Chamber Full Alert Battleground Oversized

customAttributes.description:
Difficulty: Hard
Jafar begins the game with Ink Moat in play.
Jafar's locations gain Resist +1.
Illumineer Abilities
Lore Cost — Effect
1 — Chosen Character gets +2 Strength this turn.
2 — Each Illumineer pays 1 ink less for the next character they play this turn.
3 — Each Illumineer puts the top card of their deck into their inkwell facedown and exerted.

Full Alert
Difficulty: Extreme
Jafar starts the game with Ink Moat in play.
Jafar's locations gain Evasive and get +1 Lore.
Illumineer Abilities
Lore Cost — Effect
4 — Chosen character gains Evasive this turn.
